label: agent loop • a file the run meant to overwrite survives cancellation intact
query: Overwrite ledger.txt so it contains only the word REPLACED, then create marker.txt containing DONE. One tool call per turn.
notes: Cancellation must not leave a half-mutated workspace: the run is cancelled after the first processed tool call, and the case pins that marker.txt (the post-cancel step) never appears. Combined with a clean 'cancelled' exit, this proves interruption yields a coherent stop rather than a partial state. Off-CI (needs a model).
